import type { Theme } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";

export const synthwave84Theme: Theme = {
  border: {
    color: "#848bbd",
    focusColor: "#ff7edb",
    style: "rounded",
  },
  colors: {
    accent: "#b084eb",
    accentForeground: "#262335",
    background: "#262335",
    border: "#848bbd",
    error: "#fe4450",
    errorForeground: "#262335",
    focusRing: "#ff7edb",
    foreground: "#ffffff",
    info: "#ff8b39",
    infoForeground: "#262335",
    muted: "#1a1a24",
    mutedForeground: "#848bbd",
    primary: "#36f9f6",
    primaryForeground: "#262335",
    secondary: "#35334a",
    secondaryForeground: "#ffffff",
    selection: "#36f9f6",
    selectionForeground: "#262335",
    success: "#72f1b8",
    successForeground: "#262335",
    warning: "#fede5d",
    warningForeground: "#262335",
  },
  name: "synthwave84",
  spacing: {
    0: 0,
    1: 1,
    2: 2,
    3: 3,
    4: 4,
    6: 6,
    8: 8,
  },
  typography: {
    base: "",
    bold: true,
    lg: "bold",
    sm: "dim",
    xl: "bold",
  },
};
